hook_text: The best HR director I ever met quit her job to become a client. This is why.
body:
She'd been HR director at a mid-size Omani trading company for 9 years.

Brilliant at her job. Exhausted by her tools.

Every month: the same payroll cycle. Same manual WPS prep. Same Sanad status calls. Same end-of-service queries from employees who were just curious.

"I spend 40% of my time doing work a system should do," she told me.

She left. Started a boutique HR consultancy.

Her first call to us: "I want to use your platform for all my clients."

She now manages HR compliance for 7 companies through SmartPRO Hub.

Her time allocation today:
- 15% on repetitive admin (vs 40% before)
- 45% on strategic HR advisory (vs 20% before)
- 40% on business development and client relationships

Revenue: 3x her previous salary.

The best HR professionals aren't burned out by HR. They're burned out by the tools they're forced to use.

Give them better tools and they become unstoppable.

---

Are you in HR because you love the work — or despite the tools?
